title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with Intel-soln Skillsoft Philippines, Inc. for a Collaboration for Digital Transformation Initiatives in Los Baños Through the Development and Implementation of a Super App. Councilwoman Leren Mae M. Bautista 09/11/2023
